title: Charred Velvety Zinzibarian Sausages Risotto
description: A show-off Slovakian dish featuring whole black peppercorns and infused oil to create a velvety risotto with charred zinzibarian sausages, egg-free-friendly.
instructions: Toast the sausages in a non-stick pan until they are crispy and slightly charred on all sides. Remove them from heat.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the olive oil and whisk until combined. Add chopped parsley to the pan.
Gradually add the vegetable stock while continuously stirring with a wooden spoon.
When the mixture starts simmering, add the sausages and continue cooking for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle whole black peppercorns over the risotto and stir well to infuse the flavor into the dish.
If desired, serve with grated parmesan cheese on top.
Garnish with fresh herbs before serving.
